---
title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Fiction
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★★ | A Novel
rating: 4
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# The Midnight Library
I liked the concept; being able to expereince every life that there is to experience and still going back to the original life of the author, but it comes off as a little preachy? Feels like too much of a feel good story and is a little slow at times, but overall a good read

## Reading Journey
- 2026-01-07: Started
- 2026-01-07: 1
    - 1 mins
- 2026-01-07: Finished
- Total Time Taken: 1 minutes
## Bookmarks
